---
title: "covariance_matrix"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/covariance_matrix.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/covariance_matrix.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `plot_confidence_ellipse` {#plot_confidence_ellipse}

```python
def plot_confidence_ellipse(mean, cov_matrix, ax, n_std=1.96, edgecolor='red', **kwargs)
```

Plot a confidence ellipse based on the covariance matrix.
Parameters:
- mean: The mean or center of the data (2D point, as an array-like or list).
- cov_matrix: The 2x2 covariance matrix of the data.
- ax: The matplotlib axis object where the ellipse will be drawn.
- n_std: The number of standard deviations for the ellipse's radius.
- edgecolor: The edge color of the ellipse.
- **kwargs: Additional keyword arguments for `Ellipse`.
Returns:
- A matplotlib ellipse patch.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/covariance_matrix.py#L6){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_ellipse_is_added_to_axes` {#test_ellipse_is_added_to_axes}

```python
def test_ellipse_is_added_to_axes()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/covariance_matrix.py#L28){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_ellipse_center` {#test_ellipse_center}

```python
def test_ellipse_center()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/covariance_matrix.py#L37){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_diagonal_cov_gives_axis_aligned_ellipse` {#test_diagonal_cov_gives_axis_aligned_ellipse}

```python
def test_diagonal_cov_gives_axis_aligned_ellipse()
```

For a diagonal covariance matrix the ellipse axes should align with x/y.
eigh returns eigenvalues ascending, so for cov=diag(4,1):
eigenvalues = [1, 4] -> width=2*sqrt(1)=2, height=2*sqrt(4)=4.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/covariance_matrix.py#L46){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_n_std_scales_ellipse` {#test_n_std_scales_ellipse}

```python
def test_n_std_scales_ellipse()
```

Doubling n_std should double width and height.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/covariance_matrix.py#L59){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_edgecolor` {#test_edgecolor}

```python
def test_edgecolor()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/covariance_matrix.py#L71){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
